meta.title: B&B Corte del Borgo Antico | Charming Stay in Bari Vecchia
meta.description: Experience the authenticity of Bari Vecchia at Corte del Borgo Antico. Elegant stone rooms just 200m from the Cathedral. Book your charming stay.

hero.quote: Just 200 meters from Castello Svevo, within the walls of Bari's Old Town.

about.paragraphOne: Corte del Borgo Antico is a welcoming B&B in the heart of Bari Vecchia, just a short walk from Castello Svevo and the main attractions of the historic center. Its strategic location lets you fully experience the city's authentic atmosphere.
about.paragraphTwo: The interiors are comfortable and carefully curated, with wooden ceilings that add warmth and a fully equipped kitchen for maximum independence. An ideal solution for a practical and relaxing stay in central Bari.

camera-tripla-deluxe.name: Deluxe Triple Room
camera-tripla-deluxe.description: Elegant room with exposed stone walls and vaulted ceilings. An authentic atmosphere in the heart of Bari Vecchia.

camera-matrimoniale.name: Standard Double Room
camera-matrimoniale.description: A cozy retreat with local stone finishes. Ideal for immersing yourself in the calm of the old town.

monolocale-pietra.name: Stone Studio
monolocale-pietra.description: Independent suite shaped by traditional Apulian architecture. Modern comfort wrapped in a historic shell.

bestPrice.title: Best Direct Rate
bestPrice.description: Book directly on our site to secure the lowest rate compared to major booking portals.

oldTown.title: Live the Old Town
oldTown.description: Stay in the Studio and receive an exclusive guide to the hidden gems of Bari Vecchia.

longStay.title: Long Stay Discount
longStay.description: Get 10% off stays longer than 4 nights. Discover Puglia at your own pace.

alice.author: Alice Moras
alice.text: An unforgettable stay! The attention to detail in the room and the location in the heart of Bari Vecchia are priceless.

marco.author: Marco Rossi
marco.text: The exposed stone walls and wooden ceiling create an incredible sense of peace. Spotless cleanliness and wonderful hospitality.

elena.author: Elena S.
elena.text: Perfect location for exploring the city. Just steps from San Nicola and Castello Svevo. Highly recommended!

location.directionsTitle: How to reach us from Castello Svevo

steps.one: Leave the majestic Castello Svevo behind you and cross Piazza Federico II di Svevia toward the old town.
steps.two: Enter the heart of the borgo through the alleys leading to the Cathedral of San Sabino.
steps.three: Once you reach the Cathedral square, continue east into the quieter narrow streets until you reach Strada Attolini.
steps.four: Corte Morgese is right at the corner, a peaceful oasis preserved by time.

cathedral.name: Bari Cathedral
cathedral.description: Just a short walk from your room, admire the monumental rose window lighting up the Romanesque facade.

basilica.name: Basilica of Saint Nicholas
basilica.description: The Mediterranean's most famous pilgrimage destination, home to the saint's relics.

castle.name: Castello Svevo
castle.description: The majestic Norman-Swabian fortress marking the entrance to the old town.

orecchiette.name: Orecchiette Street
orecchiette.description: Arco Basso, where Bari's women still make pasta by hand right before your eyes.

seafront.name: Seafront and harbor
seafront.description: The embrace of Bari's sea for a sunset stroll or a boat trip.

airport.name: Bari Airport
airport.description: Easily reachable with our private transfer service on request.

parking.question: Where can I park my car?
parking.answer: Corte Morgese is located in a limited traffic zone (ZTL). The nearest and most convenient parking area is along Lungomare Imperatore Augusto, just a 5-minute walk away. You can unload your luggage nearby before parking.

safety.question: Is the neighborhood safe in the evening?
safety.answer: Absolutely. Bari Vecchia is now the city's vibrant tourist heart, lively and well-monitored, with families and visitors filling its streets late into the night thanks to its many excellent bars and restaurants.

lateCheckin.question: Is late check-in available?
lateCheckin.answer: Certainly. We use an express check-in system with private codes, allowing you to access the property independently at any time, without waiting for anyone to hand over the keys.

breakfast.question: Do you offer a typical Bari breakfast?
breakfast.answer: The property offers accommodations equipped with an independent kitchen. However, we are literally 50 meters from the neighborhood's most authentic historic bars, and we will happily show you where to enjoy the best cornetto or freshly baked focaccia barese.

luggage.question: Can I leave my luggage before check-in?
luggage.answer: Yes, we have secure luggage storage inside the Corte. You can leave your bags with us in the morning and begin exploring Bari hands-free right away.

roomsPage.eyebrow: Your retreat in the heart of Bari
roomsPage.title: Our Rooms
roomsPage.description: Each room is one of a kind, carefully furnished to give you an unforgettable stay between white stone walls and the blue of the sea.
roomsPage.quote: Staying in these rooms feels like diving into Puglia's past, but with every modern comfort.

roomDetail.retreatTitle: A refuge between history and sea
roomDetail.storyParagraphOne: Located in the beating heart of Bari's historic center, the elegant {{roomName}} at Corte del Borgo Antico offers an authentic stay in air-conditioned spaces with a private entrance and free WiFi. The Basilica of Saint Nicholas is only 200 meters away.
roomDetail.storyParagraphTwo: Bari's old town is watched over by the majestic Norman-Swabian castle, surrounded by its defensive moat and winding alleys tracing the city's circular layout. During your stay, do not miss the sumptuous Basilica of Saint Nicholas and the Cathedral of San Sabino.
roomDetail.storyParagraphThree: The streets here are full of restaurants, pizzerias, and cafes. If you want to explore beyond the sea, ferries depart from the harbor 600 meters away, while the airport is just a 20-minute drive.
roomDetail.amenitiesSubtitle: Expand to see the full list of comforts
